s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Check the degree of tilt when the ELR begins to lock.

s3.ptxt: Check that the belt does not lock at less than 15 degrees of tilt in any direction but locks at over 45 degrees of tilt while gently pulling the belt.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front seat outer belt assembly with the 2 bolts.
Fully tighten the upper side bolt first, then the lower side bolt to install the front seat outer belt assembly.
Connect the connector and lock the locking button as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SHOULDER BELT ANCHOR ADJUSTER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front shoulder belt anchor adjuster assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the shoulder anchor of the front seat outer belt assembly with the nut.
Install the upper center pillar garnish LH with the bolt.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the lower center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Install the rear door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Install the front door opening trim weatherstrip LH as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: After installation, check that the corners fit correctly.

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the floor end of the front seat outer belt assembly with the bolt.

atten3.ptxt: The check should be performed with the outer belt assembly installed.

s3.ptxt: With the belt assembly installed, check that the belt locks when it is pulled out quickly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER

s2.ptxt: Engage the 3 claws and install the lap belt outer anchor cover.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
